run_git_to_parquet: run the git to parquet converter with a repo path and output file path
extract_git_commits: extract git commit history from a repository and return as a pandas DataFrame sorted by date
save_dataframe_to_parquet: save a pandas DataFrame to a Parquet file at the specified output path
review_extract_git_commits: review the extract_git_commits function to understand how it extracts commit data from a Git repository
refactor_save_dataframe_to_parquet: refactor the save_dataframe_to_parquet function to support additional output formats like CSV or JSON
